title: Full Pipeline E2E Test Suite — Design
summary: Defines a three-tier e2e test architecture (protocol, CLI, agent) for validating the SpecGraph pipeline end-to-end with real Memgraph.
notes: Filed under docs/plans/ with '-design' suffix; content is a technical specification of test tiers/suites/build tags rather than an ADR decision or PRD user story, so classified as SPEC over DOC.
